positive: Stylized minimalist jungle scene on a seamless texture background, featuring large, stylized tropical leaves (Monstera, banana, palm) overlapping in a repeating, symmetrical pattern. The artwork should utilize a limited palette of deep emerald green, vibrant teal, creamy off-white, and accents of burnt orange. Focus on clean vector-art aesthetic, thick black outlines, and negative space. Composition must be highly repeatable and centered, suitable for all-over apparel printing. High contrast, flat graphic design, screen-printed texture finish. --ar 1:1 --s 750
negative: photorealistic, fuzzy, grunge, text, signature, logo, watermark, blur, low quality, poor anatomy, extra limbs, debris, artifacts, grainy, dirty
